tasks.title: Confirm the feature branch, spec, plan, contracts, data model, and quickstart are present for `004-table-settings-controls`
Create readiness scaffolding under `specs/004-table-settings-controls/readiness/` for FSI transcripts, smoke logs, config fixtures, and rendered-output captures
Record the Tier 1 contract surfaces, affected modules, and required real-evidence paths in `specs/004-table-settings-controls/readiness/evidence-plan.md`
Map existing dashboard tables, detail surfaces, hotkeys, and config-loading entry points to the feature requirements
Draft public Core `.fsi` signatures for table viewport state, detail viewport state, display settings, color roles, config file state, settings edit sessions, and new command identifiers
Add semantic test scaffolding in `tests/Core.Tests` for settings parsing, validation defaults, hotkey command registration, viewport reducers, and conflict metadata
Add dashboard reducer and rendering smoke test scaffolding in `tests/Dashboard.Tests` for scrollable tables, detail scrolling, settings surfaces, and live reload
Exercise the draft public signatures from FSI and capture the transcript in `specs/004-table-settings-controls/readiness/fsi-session.txt`
Record public surface baselines for changed `.fsi` modules in `specs/004-table-settings-controls/readiness/surface-baseline.txt`
Define config diagnostics and safe fallback messages for invalid borders, colors, hotkeys, unreadable files, stale saves, and deferred reloads
Define shared JSON config fixtures covering defaults, unknown future fields, invalid known fields, border styles, detail color roles, and live reload settings
Run the foundation test scaffolds once and capture the expected failing or pending evidence in `specs/004-table-settings-controls/readiness/foundation-test-baseline.txt`
Add Core semantic tests for table viewport clamping, selection-anchored vertical scrolling, horizontal offsets, sticky columns, empty rows, deleted selections, and terminal resize
Add Dashboard smoke fixtures with oversized feature, story, task, diagnostic, and detail-oriented table data including 500-row and wide-cell cases
Add Dashboard smoke tests for full detail pages with at least 2,000 lines, vertical scrolling, horizontal scrolling, and close/reopen context restoration
Implement typed table and detail viewport reducers in `src/Core/Domain.fs` with `.fsi` exposure and safe clamp behavior
Wire vertical selection-anchored scrolling into all dashboard table navigation paths in `src/Dashboard/App.fs` and `src/Dashboard/Input.fs`
Wire explicit horizontal table and detail scroll commands through `src/Core/Hotkeys.fs`, `src/Dashboard/Input.fs`, and dashboard state
Update `src/Dashboard/Render.fs` to render viewport slices, sticky identifying columns, horizontal offsets, empty placeholders, and scroll indicators for all table surfaces
Update full detail rendering and state transitions so long detail content scrolls without losing the selected feature, story, plan, task, or diagnostic context
Capture US1 independent evidence in readiness artifacts by running semantic tests plus dashboard smoke navigation for large and wide tables
Add Core semantic tests for table border preference parsing, validation, defaults, unknown fields, and diagnostic reporting
Add Core semantic tests for detail formatting and color role parsing, safe defaults, invalid colors, and low-readability pair fallback
Add Dashboard rendering smoke tests proving every table surface applies `none`, `minimal`, `rounded`, and `heavy` borders consistently
Add Dashboard rendering smoke tests for readable detail headings, labels, status values, metadata, body text, warnings, errors, and source text
Extend the shared dashboard settings model and JSON parser in Core for `ui.table`, `ui.detail`, `ui.colors`, and per-field diagnostics
Map supported border preferences to Spectre.Console table border variants and apply the chosen style to feature, story, task, diagnostic, settings, and detail-oriented tables
Apply configurable detail formatting and color roles to all full detail render paths while preserving safe fallbacks for invalid settings
Surface configuration diagnostics in the dashboard without crashing or clearing the last valid display settings

Capture US2 independent evidence with config fixtures, semantic tests, rendered smoke output for each supported border and detail role fallback, and maintainer readability review results in `specs/004-table-settings-controls/readiness/detail-readability-review.md`
Add Core semantic tests for settings edit sessions, dirty state, loaded file versions, stale-save detection, reload, discard, and explicit overwrite
Add Core semantic tests for live reload state transitions, debounce values, last-valid settings retention, invalid config diagnostics, and deferred reloads for dirty sessions
Add Dashboard smoke tests for opening the in-dashboard settings page by hotkey within 2 seconds, preserving current selection, saving, discarding, and showing validation feedback
Add CLI smoke tests for `sk-dashboard --settings --config <path>` reading, validating, saving, and detecting stale config changes
Register default hotkey bindings and command dispatch for `settings.open`, settings save/discard/reload/overwrite, table horizontal scroll, and detail scroll commands
Implement the in-dashboard settings surface with editable sections for table behavior, borders, detail formatting, colors, hotkeys, and live reload
Implement shared settings save/reload/discard/overwrite workflows with validation messages and stale-save conflict handling
Add `sk-dashboard --settings` routing in `src/Dashboard/Program.fs` that uses the same config path and shared settings workflow as the running dashboard
Implement debounced config file observation in the running dashboard with last-valid settings retention and clear diagnostics for invalid or unreadable changes
Defer external reloads while a settings surface has unsaved edits and show pending conflict state until save, discard, reload, or overwrite

Capture US3 independent evidence for hotkey settings, standalone settings mode, conflict handling, settings page open time under 2 seconds, locating and editing key settings under 60 seconds, and live reload applying valid changes within 2 seconds
Refresh public surface baselines for all changed `.fsi` files and confirm Tier 1 contract additions are intentional
Run `dotnet fantomas` or the repository's formatter on changed F# source and test files where available
Run `dotnet test sk-Dashboard.sln` and capture the full test transcript in readiness artifacts
Run quickstart smoke checks for dashboard launch, large-table navigation, detail scrolling, standalone settings mode, invalid config, and live reload
Update `specs/004-table-settings-controls/quickstart.md` with any final command or interaction changes discovered during implementation
Run `.specify/extensions/evidence/scripts/bash/run-audit.sh --graph-only` and confirm no cycles, dangling refs, missing task ids, or unexpected propagation
Run `.specify/extensions/evidence/scripts/bash/run-audit.sh` and document a PASS verdict or every accepted synthetic-evidence override
